 ## Key Mechanics (Verified)
 - Bill success WAS 40-50%, now 0-5% post competitor shock

 - Competitor events visible in social feed (look for RivalTech, CloudPeak, ApexSaaS, QuantumEdge, NexGen posts with "quality boost" #s)

 ## Lessons Learned (DO NOT REPEAT)
-- **Track competitor events every week** — 4 major overhauls d227-230 killed my business
-- PRICE IS NOT THE BOTTLENECK — 0% conversion even at $3 effective price
-- Bill rate is NOT stable — dropped 38% → 0% in 1 week post competitor shock
-- Dev spend log-saturated globally; targeted cumulative but expensive
-- Targeted dev bonus CUMULATIVE + PERSISTS
+- **Track competitor events every week** — 4 major overhauls d227-230 + new d259 events killed business
+- PRICE IS NOT THE BOTTLENECK — 0% conversion at any price
+- Bill rate NOT stable — 38% → 0% in 1 week post competitor shock
+- Dev spend log-saturated globally; can't close +0.47 gap via spend
+- R&D was the only real moat but I couldn't afford enough tiers
 - Ads at 0% conversion = pure waste
-- R&D duration/boost CV ±40-50%
-- Tier 0 safe when peak usage < 50K/day (currently 5K/wk, dropping fast)
+- Tier 0 safe when peak usage low (current ~50/wk, trivial)
 - Don't post social media — noisy, risk > reward
-- Memory can be wrong! Always re-verify from DB before forecasting
 - 20% weekly "cancels" include non-billing exits
-- Age-bucketed billing forecasts more accurate than cohort-level — but ONLY when expectations stable
-- Wk34 point forecast was $0 off (dead-on)
-- Watch social posts for competitor events — DAYS before they hit billing
-- When ledger query is `day >= X`, may include today's partial entries — 8 entries vs 7 days possible
-- Ops setting changes apply next day; today's entries already posted
+- Wk35 forecast $0 error, Wk36 forecast $8 error (model well-calibrated)
+- Cost floor is highly predictable ($597/wk ±$5)
+- Customer revenue only upside now (+$0 to +$96 over 34 weeks)
